name: Aikchol Hospital Public Company Limited
summary: Aikchol Hospital Public Company Limited provides medical and nursing care services under the Aikchol Hospital trademark in Thailand. The company offers hospital services, including diseases protection, medical treatment, health strengthening, and health rehabilitation services with 340 beds in service. It serves primarily individuals, group of policyholders of the insurance company, group of contract parties' company, and group of insured on social security. Aikchol Hospital Public Company Limited was founded in 1978 is headquartered in Chonburi, Thailand.
